notice: Unofficial self-audit for evidence navigation; official judges determine the score.

runnability.evidence: One deterministic command; quick, headless, and MJCF validation modes; no remote assets.

depth_of_mujoco_use.evidence: 19 actuators, 13 sensors, five-finger articulation, collision/contact, and free/hinge/slide joints.

task_design.evidence: Seven dependent stages retrieve emergency medicine under degraded visibility with numeric success criteria.

control.evidence: 250 Hz stage planner, measured-angle dial loop, pose residual, slip observer, and 32-rollout ablation.

dexterous_manipulation.evidence: Independent five-finger actuation, thumb opposition, fine dial posture, and non-synchronous grasp closure.

engineering_quality.evidence: Compact source, configuration, validator, structured outputs, policy card, documented limitations.

presentation.evidence: Generated 30-second video with stage, progress and controller telemetry overlays plus SRT captions.

innovation.evidence: Tactile emergency access under smoke/occlusion with directly inspectable recovery evidence.
